result.finding: No explicit compliance requirements detected. This is a sample/demo veterinary clinic application (Spring PetClinic). It stores pet and owner personal data (names, addresses, phone numbers) which could theoretically require GDPR consideration in a production context, but no compliance-specific code, documentation, or enforcement is present.
evidence: No GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOX, or ISO 27001 mentions in source code or documentation
No compliance documentation (COMPLIANCE.md, SECURITY.md, privacy policy) found
No audit logging or data audit trail implementation found
No data anonymization, pseudonymization, or data deletion APIs found
Application stores owner PII: name, address, telephone (could require GDPR in production)
No payment data handling (no PCI-DSS relevance)
No health data handling (no HIPAA relevance)
